TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Abyssal Demons Faction.

Translations.Comment: Abground = abyss, Dämonen = demons. Creatures from the darkest depths.
Teufel = devil, Brut = spawn/brood. 'Vástagos' emphasizes offspring/spawn nature, fits demonic infantry role.
Seuche = plague, Wandler = walkers. Direct translation with serious tone.
Created diminutive form: 'Pestilla' (small plague) + suffix '-ejo' for a grotesque, diminutive feel. Small plague demons.
Direct compound. Classic fantasy terminology for demons wreathed in flames.
Flying plague-bearing insects. Grotesque and diseased.
Sensenträger = scythe-bearers/reapers. 'Segadores' (reapers) carries menace and death.
Direct compound. Hellish hunting beasts with serious wargame tone.
Hölle = hell. Demonic cavalry with ominous, authoritative tone.
Koloss = hulk/colossus. 'Colosó' emphasizes massive, imposing form. Massive plague monster.
Erz- prefix = arch-/chief. 'Archi-' prefix in Spanish conveys supreme authority. Greater demon lord.
Fürst = prince/lord. 'Abismal' variant emphasizes the abyssal nature more dramatically.
Herold = herald. 'Heraldo' maintains the formal, authoritative tone of a champion messenger.
